item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Warm caponata served shakshuka style with egg and Italian potato salad, toppedwith fresh herbs. Olive oil and balsamic vinegar on the side (2+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Kabak mücveri, Turkish zucchini fritters with a crisp finish and soft centre,served with orzo salad tossed with beans and roasted vegetables, topped withsalad cheese mixed with dill, mint and olive oil. Lemon and salted yoghurt onthe side (1+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Aloo palak with potatoes and spinach in creamy coconut milk and warm Indianspices, served with rice (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pad Thai with fried egg, packed with acidity, umami and fresh flavours,everything we love about Thai cuisine (1+2+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chow mein with vegetables and egg tossed with noodles, also available glutenfree, in a rich chow mein sauce with chili crisp, topped with spring onions.Smashed cucumber salad and extra chow mein sauce on the side (1+7+8+13+15)
